disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly worsening, worst-ever generalised throbbing headache over about 12 hours, unrelieved by paracetamol
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the headache and when it started?
How bad is it compared with headaches you've had before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's the worst headache I've ever had — pounding all over, it came on over about 12 hours and it just keeps getting worse. Paracetamol did nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fever — skin burning hot to touch
trigger_question_examples: Does she have a fever or feel hot?
Have you been able to take her temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's burning up — really hot to touch. We don't have a thermometer but she's clearly got a high fever.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked photophobia — light hurts her eyes so she keeps them shut in a darkened room
trigger_question_examples: Is she able to tolerate the lights on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She can't stand any light at all — she's got her eyes screwed shut and we've had to black out the room.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe neck stiffness — cannot bend the chin to the chest because of pain and stiffness
trigger_question_examples: Is her neck stiff or painful to move?
Can she bend her head forward to touch her chin to her chest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her neck is completely locked up — she can't get her chin anywhere near her chest, it's too painful and stiff.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New altered mental status over the last 2 hours — increasingly confused, sluggish and drowsy
trigger_question_examples: Is she thinking clearly, or does she seem confused or drowsy?
Has her alertness changed at all in the last few hours?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: In the last couple of hours she's gone really confused and sluggish — she's hard to rouse and not making full sense.

trigger_question_examples: Has she been sick or vomited?
Any nausea or vomiting with the headache?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, she's thrown up twice — there's a bowl by the bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No skin rash currently visible on a naked-eye check, but not yet re-checked repeatedly
trigger_question_examples: Can you check her skin all over for any red or purple spots or a rash?
If you press a clear glass on any spots, do they fade or stay?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've looked and I can't see any spots or rash on her right now — her skin looks normal colour apart from being flushed and sweaty.
